race.comment: SANNIYA (12) is a leader who extended her picket fence when easily winning the Group 3 Mystic Journey over 1200m at Hobart. She steps up to 1400m for the first time, but given the way she's been winning, that shouldn't be an issue. Newitt will skip her across and she'll take plenty of beating. GRID GIRL (3) creates plenty of interest. She's in a top Victorian stable and was last seen 11 days ago in the Group 3 Tressady Stakes at Flemington and she could have had better luck. She has pieces of form good enough and is likely to give a big sight. ZANY GIRL (13) sits at the bottom of the weights and has to be kept safe at odds. Proven at Listed and Group 2 level, as well as third-up. ALVARINHO (4) found SANNIYA 2L too good in the Mystic Journey but covered the others. Under the in-form Byrne Burke can make the finish again.
